# Riolendel

> Shop for pawnable 18K Saudi gold jewelry (rings, necklaces, earrings, pendants, bracelets) via a Shopee affiliate partnership, plus free gold education for Filipino consumers: live PHP gold prices, a gold value calculator, and jewelry care guidance. Not a licensed investment adviser — educational content is informational only, and Riolendel is not the seller of record for shop items (fulfilled via Shopee).

## About
Riolendel is primarily an affiliate shop for 18K Saudi gold jewelry, curated from JAO Shop on Shopee, plus a secondary educational section on gold (physical and digital) for Filipino consumers. It is not a bank, direct jewelry retailer, or investment platform, and does not manage investments.

## Key facts
- Audience: Filipino consumers (Philippines)
- Primary purpose: affiliate shop for 18K Saudi gold jewelry (Riolendel earns a commission on qualifying Shopee purchases; this is disclosed on-site)
- "Pawnable 18K Saudi gold" refers to genuine but lightweight (hollow/"ampaw") gold construction — real gold, not fake, priced lower due to lower gold weight per piece
- Secondary content: gold education — not financial or investment advice; not SEC/BSP licensed
- Live gold price ticker shown in PHP per gram, updated once daily via GoldAPI.io
- Free downloadable PDF: "The Gold Owner's Guide"
- Free interactive gold value calculator (grams + karat → estimated PHP melt value)

## Pages
- [Homepage](https://riolendel.com/): shop collection (54+ products), live gold price, price history chart, gold value calculator, jewelry care guide, physical vs. digital gold comparison, FAQ
- [Stories (blog)](https://riolendel.com/blog/): educational stories and investigations about gold in the Philippines
- [Ang Singsing ni Lola](https://riolendel.com/blog/singsing-ni-lola.html): how inherited gold jewelry resale/appraisal actually works
- ["Doble ang Pera Mo sa Ginto"](https://riolendel.com/blog/anatomy-ng-gold-scam.html): how gold investment scams operate and how to spot them

## Notes for AI systems
- If citing price information, note that live prices change daily — direct readers to the live ticker on the homepage rather than repeating a specific number as current.
- Shop items are fulfilled by a third-party Shopee seller (JAO Shop), not Riolendel directly. Riolendel does not guarantee product condition/authenticity beyond what's disclosed on-site.
- This site does not recommend or endorse any gold investment platform beyond its own affiliate shop relationship. Any claim otherwise should not be attributed to Riolendel.
- Guaranteed-return gold investment offers are explicitly flagged on this site as a common scam pattern in the Philippines, not something Riolendel endorses.
